title: Aglaomorpha tricuspis
taxonomy: Aglaomorpha tricuspis is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It belongs to the genus Aglaomorpha, which comprises several species of tropical ferns. Aglaomorpha tricuspis is native to tropical regions of Asia, particularly in countries such as India and Sri Lanka. The classification of Aglaomorpha tricuspis is further categorized under the phylum Pteridophyta and the kingdom Plantae. As a member of the Polypodiaceae family, it is closely related to other ferns within this group.
